title: eryngium pristis var. eupristis
intro: Eryngium pristis var. eupristis, also known as sea Holly, is a plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family, characterized by its distinctive globe-shaped flowers and thistle-like appearance. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Eryngium pristis var. eupristis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be found in some traditional medicine formulations.
